title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at Mahagun Group Capital India

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at Mahagun Group Capital India
jsonLd.description:
We at Mahagun Group Capital India are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Jabalpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Mahagun Group Capital India:
Mahagun Group Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahagun Group Capital India!
